description_long: This internet cafe building features a modern, L-shaped structure with a flat, dark gray roof and a combination of black and gray exterior walls. The front facade includes a prominent yellow and black door, likely the main entrance, and a large circular window or vent on one side, adding an industrial touch. The roof has a small raised section with a circular feature, possibly a skylight or ventilation unit. The building's surfaces are mostly matte, with some subtle texture visible on the roof and walls. There are no visible windows or signage, giving the structure a minimalist and utilitarian appearance. The overall design suggests a focus on functionality, with clean lines and a robust, solid construction.
description: A modern, L-shaped internet cafe with a flat gray roof, black and gray walls, and a distinctive yellow entrance door. The building has a minimalist, industrial look with no visible windows or signage.
description_view_0: This view shows the side of the building with a solid gray wall and the flat roof, highlighting the L-shaped layout and the absence of windows or doors.
description_view_1: The front view reveals the yellow and black entrance door, a small raised roof section, and the main facade, emphasizing the building's modern, industrial style.
description_view_2: This angle displays the large circular window or vent on the side, the L-shaped structure, and the combination of black and gray wall panels.
description_view_3: The rear view shows a mostly solid black wall with the raised roof section visible, maintaining the minimalist and robust appearance.
